title: Subfactors and Hecke groups
journal: 9th Intern. Conf. Topological Algebras and Their Applications (ICTAA-2015), May 18-22, 2015 in Holon, Israel; in memory of A. Mallios; Academic Services Proc. in Pure and Appl. Mathematics (2020), 159-164
journal_ref: 9th Intern. Conf. Topological Algebras and Their Applications (ICTAA-2015), May 18-22, 2015 in Holon, Israel; in memory of A. Mallios; Academic Services Proc. in Pure and Appl. Mathematics (2020), 159-164
abstract: We study a relation between the Hecke groups and the index of subfactors in a von Neumann algebra. Such a problem was raised by V. F. R. Jones. We solve the problem using the notion of a cluster C*-algebra.
